Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.type

Class FlixelVarTween

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.FlixelTween
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.type.FlixelVarTween
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
public class FlixelVarTween extends FlixelTween
Tweens numeric properties on a target object by name using Flixel.reflect.

At start(), each goal value is read once with FlixelReflection.property(Object, String) on the resolved leaf object (see FlixelReflection.resolvePropertyPath(Object, String) for dotted paths such as "child.x"). On every update, interpolated values are written with FlixelReflection.setProperty(Object, String, Object), so JavaBean setters run when present and behave like normal assignments.

Goals must resolve to a Number when read. Configure goals with FlixelTweenSettings.addGoal(String, float). Install a FlixelReflection implementation via Flixel.setReflection(me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.reflect.FlixelReflection) before use; the default placeholder throws until then.

This tween type is slightly slower than FlixelPropertyTween, which avoids reflection by closing over getter/setter references.

Web / TeaVM Compatibility Warning

This tween type is not recommended for games targeting the web (TeaVM) backend. It depends on runtime reflection to read and write property values every frame. TeaVM compiles Java to JavaScript ahead of time and supports reflection only through pre-generated metadata, which adds overhead and can cause unexpected failures when metadata is incomplete.

If your game targets the web, prefer FlixelPropertyTween instead. FlixelPropertyTween uses explicit getter/setter lambda references and does not rely on reflection at runtime, making it fully compatible with TeaVM and other ahead-of-time compilation targets.

To migrate, replace: 


 // VarTween (reflection-based, NOT recommended for web):
 FlixelTween.tween(sprite, new FlixelTweenSettings()
     .addGoal("x", 100f)
     .setDuration(1f));

 // PropertyTween (lambda-based, recommended for web):
 FlixelTween.tween(sprite, new FlixelTweenSettings()
     .addGoal(sprite::getX, 100f, sprite::setX)
     .setDuration(1f));
See Also:
  • FlixelPropertyTween

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelVarTween

      public FlixelVarTween(Object object, FlixelTweenSettings settings)
      Constructs a new var tween that will animate the given object's properties using reflection. Goals must be added via FlixelTweenSettings.addGoal(String, float) before starting.
      Parameters:
      object - The target object whose properties will be tweened.
      settings - The settings that configure how the tween animates.

  • Method Details

    • setObject

      public FlixelVarTween setObject(Object object)
      Sets the root target for property path resolution. Call this before start() when reusing a pooled tween whose target has changed.
      Parameters:
      object - The target object whose properties will be tweened.
      Returns:
      this tween instance for method chaining.

    • start

      public FlixelTween start()
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Starts this tween and resets every value to its initial state.
      Overrides:
      start in class FlixelTween

    • restart

      public void restart()
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Restarts this tween from the beginning. Resets elapsed time and scale so the tween runs again from the start (or from current property values for property/var tweens when restarted manually).
      Overrides:
      restart in class FlixelTween

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Specified by:
      reset in interface com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
      Overrides:
      reset in class FlixelTween

    • resetBasic

      public void resetBasic()
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Resets only the basic values of this tween without removing any references to the object, its settings or its callback function.
      Overrides:
      resetBasic in class FlixelTween

    • isTweenOf

      public boolean isTweenOf(Object o, String field)
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Whether this tween is considered to animate object for the given logical field or path. Used by FlixelTweenManager.cancelTweensOf(Object, String...) and related APIs.
      Overrides:
      isTweenOf in class FlixelTween
      Parameters:
      o - The instance to test (e.g. the root passed to cancelTweensOf).
      field - Optional goal key or dotted path (e.g. "x" or "weapon.rotation"); null or empty matches any field on object for types that support it.
      Returns:
      false by default; subclasses override.
